TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Minse, title = Minse, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Minse} }

S.FORM: = Minse = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Minse. 13 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 69 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 27 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 42 hiyi koia. Tnhangan alang Alang Ming-sen. Thyang alang Hangan alang"ngudus" mniq kari Atayal dungus bi "ngudus" Ksun. Hangan Tlu o mnuda tgdha spayis bukuy kida, mangal kska pusu ming-sng cu-yi na " ming-sng". Nniqan alang Sing-cu-seyn Wu-hong-sayng Alang Taw-san. Klbangan Sing-cu-seyng Wu-hong-syang Alang Taw-san 4 ling quri hiya tnalang, seejiq Atayal slawa dha "Ngudus＇",gaga mniq hhunac hraan hidaw Alang Ulay. Kndkilan lnglingay Ida gaga mniq Ming-tu-yuow-san siyaw gqiyan hunac, quri Elug cing-s. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Mniq alang seejiq Seejiq Atayal. Skari kari Kari Atayal, kari Tlu, kari Khilang. Snhiyaan Jidujyao. Pnyahan alang Tnalang nii o ida tndhiya seejiq Squliq-ma-ka-na-ci Nsgan na S-jya-ru(Sijakaro, uxay uri o sia-ke-row) klgan seejiq. Ida murug "Gaya na Tayal"ni "Patas emnuda Kaw-sa-cu "na pntasan,kla mniq Cen-si-baw, bukuy do ini baka ka dxgal qpahan,nthjil mniq quri Cing-wey-san-lug, bukuy duri mniq thjil ruwan Sia-ke-row, "ida tnalang S-rug ", kiya ka bukuy euda Sia-ke-row, duma seejiq o tmhjil hini mniq da. klaan rrigan Teumal bnatas patas Kndusan Atayal: Thjil ni kkrana Alang: pnatas Lyaw-so-cen. Knlangan sing-wun cwan-ke sapah pyasan kwan-kwang ke. Hnkawas1984 . klabuy 152-153 Hangan dxgal Taywan ce-su-jung maxal spac: Sin-cu sayn. Lyuo-ming-yi dnii snalu. Tay-wan-seng wun-syeyn wey-yueyn-hwey. Hnkawas 2010. Klabuy 594. Patas emnuda Kaw-sa-cu: Endaan sbiyaw. Taywan cun-du-fu cing-wu-cuy li-hwan-ke pusu pnatas; Cung-yan-yayn-cyo-yueyn ming-cu-suey yayn-cyo-swo snalu tmhjil. Cung-yayn-yueyn ming-cu-swo. Hnkawas 2011. Klabuy 84.
S.PHON: = minsə = gaga mniq sinʦusən u*uŋsjaŋ ka alaŋ minsə. ** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, ** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. tnħaŋan alaŋ alaŋ miŋ-sən. tħjaŋ alaŋ ħaŋan alaŋ"ŋudus" mniq kaɾi atajal duŋus bi "ŋudus" ksun. ħaŋan tlu o mnuda tgdħa spajis bukuj kida, maŋal kska pusu miŋ-sŋ ʦu-ji na " miŋ-sŋ". nniqan alaŋ siŋ-ʦu-sən wu-ħoŋ-sajŋ alaŋ taw-san. klbaŋan siŋ-ʦu-səŋ wu-ħoŋ-sjaŋ alaŋ taw-san * liŋ quɾi ħija tnalaŋ, səəɟiq atajal slawa dħa "ŋudus*",gaga mniq ħħunaʦ ħɾaan ħidaw alaŋ ulaj. kndkilan lŋliŋaj ida gaga mniq miŋ-tu-juow-san sijaw gqijan ħunaʦ, quɾi əlug ʦiŋ-s. kklaan ppanan mlutuʦ sjusan tən-ʦ mniq alaŋ səəɟiq səəɟiq atajal. skaɾi kaɾi kaɾi atajal, kaɾi tlu, kaɾi kħilaŋ. snħijaan ɟiduɟjao. pnjaħan alaŋ tnalaŋ nii o ida tndħija səəɟiq squliq-ma-ka-na-ʦi nsgan na s-ɟja-ɾu(siɟakaɾo, uxaj uɾi o sia-kə-ɾow) klgan səəɟiq. ida muɾug "gaja na tajal"ni "patas əmnuda kaw-sa-ʦu "na pntasan,kla mniq ʦən-si-baw, bukuj do ini baka ka dxgal qpaħan,ntħɟil mniq quɾi ʦiŋ-wə-san-lug, bukuj duɾi mniq tħɟil ɾuwan sia-kə-ɾow, "ida tnalaŋ s-ɾug ", kija ka bukuj əuda sia-kə-ɾow, duma səəɟiq o tmħɟil ħini mniq da. klaan ɾɾigan təumal bnatas patas kndusan atajal: tħɟil ni kkɾana alaŋ: pnatas ljaw-so-ʦən. knlaŋan siŋ-wun ʦwan-kə sapaħ pjasan kwan-kwaŋ kə. ħnkawas**** . klabuj ***-*** ħaŋan dxgal tajwan ʦə-su-ɟuŋ maxal spaʦ: sin-ʦu sajn. ljuo-miŋ-ji dnii snalu. taj-wan-səŋ wun-sjən wə-juən-ħwə. ħnkawas ****. klabuj ***. patas əmnuda kaw-sa-ʦu: əndaan sbijaw. tajwan ʦun-du-*u ʦiŋ-wu-ʦuj li-ħwan-kə pusu pnatas; ʦuŋ-jan-jajn-ʦjo-juən miŋ-ʦu-suə jajn-ʦjo-swo snalu tmħɟil. ʦuŋ-jajn-juən miŋ-ʦu-swo. ħnkawas ****. klabuj **.
S.FORM: = Minse = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ufungsyang ka alang Minse. 13 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 69 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 27 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 42 hiyi koia. Tnhangan alang Alang Ming-sen. Thyang alang Hangan alang"ngudus" mniq kari Atayal dungus bi "ngudus" Ksun. Hangan Tlu o mnuda tgdha spayis bukuy kida, mangal kska pusu ming-sng cu-yi na " ming-sng". Nniqan alang Sing-cu-seyn Wu-hong-sayng Alang Taw-san. Klbangan Sing-cu-seyng Wu-hong-syang Alang Taw-san 4 ling quri hiya tnalang, seejiq Atayal slawa dha "Ngudus＇",gaga mniq hhunac hraan hidaw Alang Ulay. Kndkilan lnglingay Ida gaga mniq Ming-tu-yuow-san siyaw gqiyan hunac, quri Elug cing-s. Kklaan ppanan Mlutuc syusan Teyn-c Mniq alang seejiq Seejiq Atayal. Skari kari Kari Atayal, kari Tlu, kari Khilang. Snhiyaan Jidujyao. Pnyahan alang Tnalang nii o ida tndhiya seejiq Squliq-ma-ka-na-ci Nsgan na S-jya-ru(Sijakaro, uxay uri o sia-ke-row) klgan seejiq. Ida murug "Gaya na Tayal"ni "Patas emnuda Kaw-sa-cu "na pntasan,kla mniq Cen-si-baw, bukuy do ini baka ka dxgal qpahan,nthjil mniq quri Cing-wey-san-lug, bukuy duri mniq thjil ruwan Sia-ke-row, "ida tnalang S-rug ", kiya ka bukuy euda Sia-ke-row, duma seejiq o tmhjil hini mniq da. klaan rrigan Teumal bnatas patas Kndusan Atayal: Thjil ni kkrana Alang: pnatas Lyaw-so-cen. Knlangan sing-wun cwan-ke sapah pyasan kwan-kwang ke. Hnkawas1984 . klabuy 152-153 Hangan dxgal Taywan ce-su-jung maxal spac: Sin-cu sayn. Lyuo-ming-yi dnii snalu. Tay-wan-seng wun-syeyn wey-yueyn-hwey. Hnkawas 2010. Klabuy 594. Patas emnuda Kaw-sa-cu: Endaan sbiyaw. Taywan cun-du-fu cing-wu-cuy li-hwan-ke pusu pnatas; Cung-yan-yayn-cyo-yueyn ming-cu-suey yayn-cyo-swo snalu tmhjil. Cung-yayn-yueyn ming-cu-swo. Hnkawas 2011. Klabuy 84.
